message:
feat(render-canvas): implement path marker drawing for canvas backend

The canvas renderer previously stubbed out marker drawing with placeholder
`let _ = path.marker_start` ignores. This implements full marker rendering
by computing path start/end tangent geometry from MoveTo/LineTo/QuadTo/CubicTo
commands and dispatching to the appropriate marker shape (circle, cross, arrow,
diamond, etc.).

- Add draw_path_markers() and draw_marker() methods to Canvas2dRenderer
- Add path_marker_start_geometry() and path_marker_end_geometry() helpers
  that compute (x, y, angle) from PathCmd sequences including curves
- Add angle_between(), angle_from_start_tangent(), angle_from_end_tangent()
  geometry utilities
- Import MarkerKind from fm_layout
- Rename budget-broker simplified theme from "plain" to "monochrome"
- Add render_scene_draws_path_markers test verifying circle + arrow markers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
